title: AD_FrontalCortex_Sample279_TechRep1
source_name_ch1: Alzheimer's disease frontal cortex sample 279 technical replicate #1
extract_protocol_ch1: RNA was extracted from the samples using the mirVana miRNA isolation kit (Ambion).
label_protocol_ch1: Agilent’s Low Input QuickAmp Labeling Kit was used with 100 ng total RNA/sample to generate cRNA labelled with Cy3 and Cy5 dyes
hyb_protocol: For each sample, 300 ng of labelled, linearly amplified cRNA was digested and hybridized for 17 hrs on Agilent Human 8x60k v2 microarrays
scan_protocol: Slides were scanned on an Agilent C Microarray Scanner using the G3 microarray format with the resolution set to 3µm.
description.3: Alzheimer's disease frontal cortex sample 279 technical replicate #1
data_processing: Data was extracted via Agilent Feature Extraction Software (v 10.7.3.1). Extracted data was imported into R via limma where data was background subtracted, normalized between arrays, and log2 transformed.

extract_protocol_ch1: RNA was extracted from the samples using the mirVana miRNA isolation kit (Ambion).
label_protocol_ch1: Agilent’s Low Input QuickAmp Labeling Kit was used with 100 ng total RNA/sample to generate cRNA labelled with Cy3 and Cy5 dyes
hyb_protocol: For each sample, 300 ng of labelled, linearly amplified cRNA was digested and hybridized for 17 hrs on Agilent Human 8x60k v2 microarrays
scan_protocol: Slides were scanned on an Agilent C Microarray Scanner using the G3 microarray format with the resolution set to 3µm.
description.3: frontal cortex sample 100 technical replicate #2
data_processing: Data was extracted via Agilent Feature Extraction Software (v 10.7.3.1). Extracted data was imported into R via limma where data was background subtracted, normalized between arrays, and log2 transformed.
